sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: VSee Health 2025 10-K: Revenue $14.6M, Loss per Share $(0.73)
feed.summary: VSee Health reported 2025 revenue of $14.62 million, a 40% increase attributed to the iDoc acquisition and higher telehealth volume. The company saw a net loss of $(14.74) million and a loss per share of $(0.73), an improvement from the prior year due to the absence of a goodwill impairment charge. Gross margin slightly increased to $7.36 million, and the company expanded its telecritical care, VSee Lab SaaS subscriptions, and professional EEG services.

feed.title: Vontier Secures $300 Million 364-Day Unsecured Term Loan With PNC Bank
feed.summary: Vontier has secured a $300 million 364-day senior unsecured term loan facility with PNC Bank and a syndicate of lenders. This loan, signed on March 31, 2026, aims to bolster Vontier's liquidity and provide financial flexibility for general corporate purposes. The interest rate for this loan will vary based on Vontier's long-term credit ratings.

feed.title: Vontier (NYSE: VNT) secures new 364-day $300M senior unsecured loan
feed.summary: Vontier Corporation secured a new 364-day, $300 million senior unsecured term loan facility from a syndicate of lenders with PNC Bank, National Association, as administrative agent. The loan matures on March 30, 2027, providing short-term funding capacity. Interest rates are variable, tied to either Term SOFR or a Base Rate, plus a margin determined by Vontier's long-term debt credit ratings.

feed.title: Universal Technical (NYSE: UTI) legal chief sells 23,654 shares
feed.summary: Christopher E. Kevane, EVP and Chief Legal Officer of Universal Technical Institute (NYSE: UTI), sold 23,654 shares of company common stock on March 27, 2026, at a weighted average price of $37.5461 per share. Following this open-market transaction, Kevane directly holds 83,521 shares, indicating he maintains a substantial equity stake. The sale is categorized as a routine insider transaction rather than a major event.

feed.title: United Therapeutics (UTHR) CEO sells 9,500 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: United Therapeutics (UTHR) CEO Martine Rothblatt exercised options for 9,500 shares and subsequently sold them in open-market transactions on March 30, 2026, under a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. The transactions involved exercising options at $146.03 per share and selling shares between approximately $581-$603, totaling a net sale of $5.61 million. This activity is considered routine diversification, with Rothblatt retaining substantial direct and indirect holdings in the company.

feed.title: UNITED THERAPEUTICS (UTHR) director exercises options and sells 1,300 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Christopher Causey, a director at UNITED THERAPEUTICS Corp (UTHR), exercised stock options for 1,300 shares at $119.76 per share and simultaneously sold 1,300 shares at $604.64 per share. These transactions, executed on March 30, 2026, were pre-planned under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established on September 30, 2025. Following these trades, Causey directly holds 4,190 shares of Common Stock.

feed.title: Velocity Financial (VEL) legal chief sells 14,840 shares, retains 98,994
feed.summary: Velocity Financial's Chief Legal Officer and General Counsel, Kelly Roland Thomas, sold a total of 14,840 shares of common stock over two days, March 30 and March 31, 2026. These open-market sales were executed at weighted average prices of $18.0339 and $18.2157 per share, respectively. Following these transactions, Thomas still holds 98,994 shares of Velocity Financial common stock.

feed.title: AgEagle Aerial Systems (NYSE: UAVS) furnishes Q4 and 2025 results
feed.summary: AgEagle Aerial Systems Inc. released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, along with a broader company update. This information was provided via a press release attached as Exhibit 99.1 to a Form 8-K filing. The company clarified that this information is "furnished" rather than "filed," meaning it is not subject to certain liability provisions of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934.

feed.title: URGN SEC Filings - Urogen Pharma 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page on Stock Titan provides a comprehensive resource for Urogen Pharma (URGN) SEC filings, including 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly reports, 8-K material event reports, and insider trading forms. It aggregates regulatory disclosures for the Israel-organized biotechnology issuer listed on The Nasdaq Stock Market. The platform also offers AI-powered summaries, impact scoring, and sentiment analysis for each filing, helping investors quickly understand complex financial and governance information.

feed.title: UVE Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: This report provides a financial analysis of Universal Insurance Holdings Inc (UVE), detailing its profitability ratios such as operating margin (21.39%), net margin (16.47%), and Return on Equity (39.59%). It highlights the company's competitive position with a market capitalization of $956.76M and compares its efficiency against competitors like UFCS and ASIC, although specific gross margin figures for UVE and its competitors are noted as "N/A".

feed.title: [Form 4] UNIVERSAL INSURANCE HOLDINGS, INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: UNIVERSAL INSURANCE HOLDINGS, INC. CEO Stephen Donaghy reported routine equity compensation activities, including the exercise of 14,598 restricted stock units (RSUs) and the withholding of 12,031 shares for tax obligations. These transactions, occurring on March 27 and March 30, 2026, were not open-market sales. Following these activities, Donaghy directly owns 699,461 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Director’s trust trims Universal Insurance (UVE) stake by 2,000 shares
feed.summary: Universal Insurance Holdings director Richard D. Peterson, through The RDP Revocable Trust, sold 2,000 shares of common stock at a weighted average price of $34.1035 per share on March 30, 2026. Following this transaction, the trust holds 6,319 shares, and Peterson directly owns 19,136 shares. The sale by the trust was an open-market transaction and represents a neutral filing impact with a negative sentiment.

feed.title: Campos Kimberly D, cio & cao of Universal Insurance, sells $32k in UVE stock
feed.summary: Kimberly D. Campos, CIO & CAO of Universal Insurance Holdings (NASDAQ:UVE), sold 946 shares of UVE common stock for $32,277 on March 31, 2026, and also exercised options to acquire 1,251 shares at no cost. This transaction follows the company's Q4 2025 financial results, where Universal Insurance Holdings reported an EPS of $2.17, significantly surpassing analysts' expectations, despite a slight revenue miss.

feed.title: ProShares Ultra Semiconductors urges diversification as market volatility mounts
feed.summary: ProShares Ultra Semiconductors is advocating for increased portfolio diversification as a response to current market uncertainties and geopolitical conflicts. Simeon Hyman, Global Investment Strategist at ProShares, highlighted the importance of investing in companies that manage essential assets on Schwab Network, noting that diversified portfolios have historically demonstrated greater resilience during volatile periods. This advice aligns with the firm's ongoing emphasis on exposure to diversified and essential assets.

feed.title: ProShares Ultra Nasdaq Cybersecurity declares quarterly distribution of $0.2722
feed.summary: ProShares Ultra Nasdaq Cybersecurity has announced a quarterly distribution of $0.2722 per share. This distribution will be paid on April 27, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 20, 2026, with an ex-dividend date of April 17, 2026.

feed.title: ULH PE Ratio & Valuation, Is ULH Overvalued
feed.summary: Universal Logistics Holdings Inc (ULH) is currently considered overvalued, with its forward PE ratio of 23.33 significantly higher than its five-year average of 8.86. The fair price for ULH, based on relative valuation, is estimated to be between $6.68 and $13.96, indicating that the current price of $21.14 is overvalued by 51.47%. Additionally, ULH's P/S ratio is above the industry average, which is deemed unsustainable given its negative revenue growth.

feed.title: Universal Logistics (ULH) details 2026 shareholder votes, Moroun control and executive pay
feed.summary: Universal Logistics Holdings, Inc. (ULH) has released details for its 2026 annual stockholder meeting on April 29, 2026, where shareholders will vote on the election of nine directors, the non-binding approval of executive compensation, and the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor. The proxy statement highlights ULH's controlled-company status, with Moroun family trusts holding 72.9% of common stock, and outlines executive compensation plans for CEO Tim Phillips and CFO Jude Beres, which include salary, cash bonuses, and time-based restricted stock. It also details various related-party transactions with Moroun-affiliated entities for services such as administrative support, insurance, and real estate leasing.

feed.title: EBIT per share of UMH Properties, Inc. – MUN:WXE
feed.summary: This article displays the EBIT per share for UMH Properties, Inc. (MUN:WXE). It is presented within the TradingView platform, which offers various financial tools and market data. The content is primarily a data placeholder within a larger financial information display.

feed.title: [8-K] Udemy, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Udemy, Inc. (UDMY) reported a material event in an 8-K filing related to its previously announced merger with Coursera, Inc. The filing addresses three lawsuits and several demand letters challenging the merger, primarily alleging disclosure deficiencies in the Joint Proxy Statement/Prospectus. While Udemy and Coursera maintain the disclosures comply with applicable law, they are voluntarily providing supplemental disclosures to avoid nuisance and potential delays in the merger process.

feed.title: [IRANNOTICE] Ternium S.A. SEC Filing
feed.summary: Ternium S.A. has filed an IRANNOTICE with the SEC, indicating disclosures made in its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. This filing is mandated under Section 219 of the Iran Threat Reduction and Syria Human Rights Act of 2012 and Section 13(r) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934. The filing was submitted on March 31, 2026, and signed by Chief Financial Officer Pablo Brizzio.

feed.title: Televisa (TV) director discloses CPO awards in Long-Term Retention Plan Form 3
feed.summary: Televisa director Denise Maerker Salmon filed a Form 3 disclosing indirect interests in compensation-linked CPO positions through a Long-Term Retention Plan. This filing doesn't report new purchases or sales but outlines existing CPO-based derivative awards with varying exercise prices and expiration dates ranging from 2026 to 2029. Each CPO represents a bundle of different Televisa share series, and exercise prices are converted to USD.

feed.title: Televisa (TV) director Phillips Margain discloses direct and plan CPO holdings
feed.summary: GRUPO TELEVISA, S.A.B. director Guadalupe Phillips Margain filed an initial Form 3, disclosing her existing holdings of the company’s CPOs. She reported holding 605,275 CPOs directly and an additional 277,500 CPOs indirectly through a Stock Purchase Plan. The indirect plan involves an exercise price of $0.0900 per CPO, with a trust facilitating the sale of CPOs to cover this price and deliver the remainder to her.

feed.title: Grupo Televisa (NYSE: TV) director discloses direct and plan CPO stakes
feed.summary: GRUPO TELEVISA, S.A.B. director Francisco Jose Chevez Robelo has filed an initial ownership report revealing his holdings of Certificados de Participacion Ordinarios (CPOs). He directly holds 605,275 CPOs and indirectly owns 277,500 CPOs through a Stock Purchase Plan. The indirect holdings relate to CPOs with an exercise price of $0.0900 per CPO, equivalent to Ps.1.60 per CPO, based on a conversion rate of 17.8874 Mexican Pesos per US dollar.

feed.title: Tenaris (NYSE: TS) submits 2025 annual report and audits to SEC
feed.summary: Tenaris S.A. (NYSE: TS) has submitted its 2025 Annual Report to the SEC via a Form 6-K, following its original filing with the Luxembourg Stock Exchange. This report includes the consolidated management report with financial and sustainability information, management certifications for financial statements and annual accounts as of December 31, 2025, and external auditors' reports. The filing provides transparent documentation of Tenaris's financial performance and sustainability efforts for the year.

feed.title: Reasons Why You Should Retain TransUnion Stock in Your Portfolio
feed.summary: TransUnion (TRU) is identified as a strong stock to retain in a portfolio due to its benefits from the rapidly growing big data and analytics market. The company demonstrates robust growth scores, an encouraging earnings surprise history, and strategic acquisitions. While acknowledging a risk associated with its debt-to-equity ratio stemming from past acquisitions, its strong liquidity position and projected earnings and revenue growth make it an attractive option.

feed.title: TC Energy urges swifter, more ambitious development of natural gas projects
feed.summary: TC Energy CEO François Poirier advocates for Canada to aggressively ramp up natural gas exports to Asia, citing heightened geopolitical tensions and global demand. He calls for streamlined regulations and permit approvals to attract foreign investment and seize the opportunity presented by disruptions in Middle Eastern oil and gas supplies. Poirier believes this strategy could significantly boost Canada's GDP and economic sovereignty.

feed.title: Interactive Strength reports $11.5M revenue, $(23.97)M net loss in 2025 10-K
feed.summary: Interactive Strength (TRNR) reported consolidated revenue of $11.53 million for the fiscal year 2025, a 114% increase from 2024, largely due to the Wattbike acquisition. The company's net loss narrowed to $(23.968) million from $(34.934) million in the previous year, with gross profit recovering to $0.913 million. The revenue growth was driven by a shift towards commercial hardware sales and an expansion strategy focusing on distributor partnerships and international markets.

feed.title: Toll Brothers Announces New Luxury Shallowford Pointe Community in Marietta
feed.summary: Toll Brothers has announced the development of Shallowford Pointe in Marietta, Georgia, a new luxury community featuring single-family homes starting at $1 million. The development will offer resort-style amenities and access to top-rated Cobb County schools, with sales anticipated to begin in late 2026. This expansion reflects continued demand for high-end residential options in the East Cobb market.

feed.title: Toll Brothers Announces New Shallowford Pointe Community Coming Soon to Marietta, Georgia
feed.summary: Toll Brothers announced its new luxury home community, Shallowford Pointe, is coming soon to Marietta, Georgia. Located in the East Cobb area, the community will feature single-family homes priced from $1 million, resort-style amenities, and access to highly-rated Cobb County schools. Site work is currently underway, with sales anticipated to begin in late 2026.

feed.title: Tejon Ranch (TRC) CEO granted 32,435 shares, 13,509 withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Tejon Ranch Co. CEO Matthew H. Walker received a stock award of 32,435 shares of common stock on March 31, 2026, at $17.92 per share. Concurrently, 13,509 shares were withheld to cover tax obligations, not sold on the open market. Following these transactions, the CEO directly holds 18,926 shares of Tejon Ranch Co. Common Stock.

feed.title: Appeals Court Denies Families' Bid to Reopen Boeing 737 Max Criminal Case
feed.summary: A federal appeals court has denied a request from victims' families to reopen a criminal case against Boeing concerning the 737 Max crashes, ruling that the Department of Justice did not violate their rights in reaching a deal with the company. This decision means Boeing will not face criminal accountability for the crashes that killed 346 people. The families' lawyers are considering further appeals, highlighting the ongoing tension between victims seeking justice and the department's settlement.

feed.title: Hasbro partners with TMX Transform as it opens new omnichannel US distribution centre
feed.summary: Hasbro has opened a new 600,000-square-foot omnichannel distribution center in Midway, Georgia, supported by supply chain consultancy TMX Transform. This facility aims to optimize storage, consolidate business segments, and enhance distribution capabilities across North America. TMX Transform also assisted with the transition from Hasbro's previous facility, including selecting a new 3PL operator and leading lease negotiations that resulted in significant tenant improvements.

feed.title: Tungray Technologies (TRSG) director Vassily Kevin files initial Form 3
feed.summary: Tungray Technologies (TRSG) director Vassily Kevin has filed an initial Form 3 with the SEC, indicating his beneficial ownership status as a director. The filing shows no reported transactions or holdings in company securities at this time, serving as a baseline disclosure of his new role. This Form 3 is an initial statement required for insiders to report their ownership upon becoming an officer, director, or large shareholder.

feed.title: TH International (THCH) director Paul Hong submits insider Form 3
feed.summary: TH International Ltd (THCH) director Paul Seungpyo Hong has filed an initial Form 3, which establishes his status as an insider for reporting purposes. This filing is a statement of beneficial ownership and does not indicate any purchases, sales, or other transactions of the company's securities. It primarily serves to publicly acknowledge his ownership reporting obligations as a director.

feed.title: TH International (THCH) CEO details direct and indirect share holdings
feed.summary: TH International Ltd (THCH) CEO Lu Yongchen has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing his beneficial ownership in the company. The filing details direct holdings of ordinary shares and several option-like positions with varying exercise prices and expiration dates. Additionally, it reveals an indirect holding of 315,661 ordinary shares through L&L Tomorrow Holdings Limited, a company wholly owned by Lu Yongchen.

feed.title: TOMI Environmental Solutions 10-K: $5.64M Revenue, $(0.19) EPS
feed.summary: TOMI Environmental Solutions reported fiscal 2025 net sales of $5.636 million and a basic and diluted loss per share of $(0.19), with revenue decline attributed to the timing of large equipment purchases. Despite lower sales, the company improved its gross profit margin to 54.6% and narrowed its net loss to $(3.749) million due to cost management and prior-year inventory adjustments. TOMI also highlighted strategic OEM partnerships, product expansion into new markets like aerospace and cell & gene therapy, and securing a significant commercial SIS installation.

feed.title: TOMI sales fell in 2025, but it says Q1 is already ahead
feed.summary: TOMI Environmental Solutions reported a revenue decline to $5.64M in 2025 from $7.74M in 2024, attributed to deferred capital expenditure projects by customers amidst economic uncertainties. Despite the sales drop, the company maintained a strong gross margin of approximately 55% and narrowed its net loss, while expanding internationally and growing its sales backlog. TOMI anticipates improved performance in Q1 2026, driven by a robust pipeline of integration projects and continued focus on global market expansion and operational efficiencies.

feed.title: TMFG Should I Buy
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Motley Fool Global Opportunities ETF (TMFG), questioning whether it is a good investment. It presents current stock prices, an overview of financial data categories such as growth, profitability, and efficiency, and Wall Street analyst forecasts. The article indicates that analysts expect TMFG's stock price to rise, although specific data and ratings are not yet available.

feed.title: Exclusive:Top Public Companies Holding XRP
feed.summary: This CoinPedia report highlights public companies holding XRP, detailing their allocations, reasons for valuing XRP's cross-border payment infrastructure, and financial disclosures. Companies like SBI Holdings, Trident Digital Tech, and Webus International are identified, showcasing a growing trend of corporate treasury commitments to XRP despite current unrealized losses. The article also provides a hypothetical gain/loss statement for these companies' XRP holdings.

feed.title: Grand opening at Timberland Bancorp draws visitors as giveaway winner announced
feed.summary: Timberland Bancorp hosted a grand opening event for its new branch at 6916 19th St W in University Place, during which Carli Lawlor was announced as the winner of the Big Green Egg giveaway. The event engaged local officials and community members, highlighting the company's commitment to community involvement. Simultaneously, Timberland Bancorp continues to prioritize customer security by advising clients to be aware of increasing scam and fraud threats.

feed.title: [Form 4] HANOVER INSURANCE GROUP, INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: HANOVER INSURANCE GROUP, INC. (THG) Executive Vice President Salvatore J. Bryan reported an acquisition of 30.677 restricted stock units (RSUs) as a dividend-related award. These RSUs are part of the company’s 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan and vest on the third anniversary of the original RSU grant date. Following this transaction, Bryan directly holds 29,069.276 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Hanover Insurance (NYSE: THG) EVP granted RSUs from dividend equivalents
feed.summary: Hanover Insurance Group Executive Vice President T. Lee received 13.522 restricted stock units (RSUs) as dividend equivalent rights on previously granted RSUs under the company’s 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan. These RSUs will vest on the third anniversary of the original grant date, bringing Lee's direct holdings to 6,982.373 shares of common stock. This transaction is an award, not a market purchase or sale, and it reflects compensation tied to existing RSU awards.

feed.title: Dividend RSUs boost Hanover (NYSE: THG) EVP Lovely’s share awards
feed.summary: Hanover Insurance Group Executive Vice President David John Lovely received an additional equity award of 13.246 dividend-equivalent restricted stock units (RSUs) at $0.00 per share, increasing his direct holdings to 3,807.921 shares. This award is part of Hanover's 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan, accruing from dividend equivalent rights on previously granted RSUs, and is considered a compensation-related accrual rather than a stock purchase. The RSUs will vest on the third anniversary of the original RSU grant date.

feed.title: Hanover Insurance (NYSE: THG) EVP receives 18.998 RSUs via dividend equivalents
feed.summary: Dennis Francis Kerrigan, EVP at Hanover Insurance Group (NYSE: THG), received 18.998 restricted stock units (RSUs) as dividend equivalent rights under the company's 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan. These RSUs will vest on the third anniversary of the original RSU grant date, bringing Kerrigan's direct holdings to 11,987.721 shares. This transaction is categorized as a neutral filing impact and sentiment, reflecting an award rather than an open-market trade.

feed.title: TFPM: 2024 guidance dips on Cerro Lindo and Northparkes, but production and NAV growth remain strong
feed.summary: Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. (TFPM) anticipates lower 2024 guidance due to factors at Cerro Lindo and Northparkes, despite projected production growth to 140,000–150,000 gold equivalent ounces by 2030. The company maintains strong cash flow, a debt-free balance sheet, and has made recent investments to support portfolio growth. This summary is AI-generated and requires verification.

feed.title: Proposed 3.88M share sale by Triple Flag Precious Metals (TFPM) via Goldman Sachs
feed.summary: Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. (TFPM) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 3,880,000 common shares through Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC. The shares were originally issued on July 15, 2020, to Triple Flag Mining Aggregator S.à r.l. The filing notes a dollar figure of $127,535,600.00, but does not specify the exact timing or net proceeds of the sale.

feed.title: Pineal Capital Urges Teladoc Health Board Changes
feed.summary: Pineal Capital Management has sent an open letter to Teladoc Health's board, advocating for significant changes to its leadership and strategic direction. The investment firm, which holds a substantial stake in Teladoc, believes the current board and management lack the necessary expertise to navigate the evolving telehealth market effectively. Pineal Capital is pushing for a shift from aggressive expansion to a focus on profitability and increased shareholder value, a move that could significantly impact the future of the telehealth industry.

feed.title: Telomir Pharmaceuticals Regains Nasdaq Listing Rule Compliance
feed.summary: Telomir Pharmaceuticals Inc. (TELO) has announced it has regained compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5620(a) following its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. This resolution stabilizes the company's Nasdaq listing status and removes uncertainty for investors. An analyst has rated TELO stock a Buy with an $8.00 price target.

feed.title: [ARS] TEVA PHARMACEUTICAL INDUSTRIES LTD SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an ARS SEC filing by Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. (TEVA) on March 31, 2026. The filing is categorized with low impact and neutral sentiment, and the article provides quick access to view the full PDF document and the original filing on SEC EDGAR. It also includes an overview of TEVA's stock data, rankings, and recent news and SEC filings.

feed.title: A Look At TriCo Bancshares (TCBK) Valuation After ESOP Shelf Registration Filing
feed.summary: TriCo Bancshares (TCBK) has filed a shelf registration for up to 1,200,000 shares for an employee stock ownership plan, totaling about $56.892 million. While the company's valuation, based on a P/E of 12.5x, appears overvalued compared to the US banks average, a Discounted Cash Flow model suggests the shares might be significantly undervalued at $47.09, sitting about 37.9% below an estimated fair value of $75.87. This presents a mixed signal for investors, highlighting the need to consider both current earnings multiples and long-term cash flow projections.
